pi:text-file: Sad upset blue down melancholy somber bitter troubled Angry mad enraged irate irritable wrathful outraged infuriated Happy cheerful content elated joyous delighted lively glad Confused disoriented puzzled perplexed dazed befuddled Excited eager thrilled delighted Scared afraid fearful panicked terrified petrified startled Nervous anxious jittery jumpy tense uneasy apprehensive
